title: Generate and View Script Listings
text: Generate and View Script Listings You can configure Uniface to generate script listings by setting the $LISTING_LEVEL assignment setting or by using the /lis command line switch. To set the default compile behavior, set the $LISTING_LEVEL assignment setting in the ide.asn file. For example: [SETTINGS] $LISTING_LEVEL = 2 Copy To manually generate script listings, use the /lis subswitch when compiling components from the command line. This overrides the assignment file and preferences. For example, the following command compiles all forms and generates a Type 2 script listing for each of them, and including information messages: ide /frm /lis=2 /inf Copy Related Links $LISTING_LEVEL Produce compile listings of ProcScript modules. /lis Produce compile listings of ProcScript modules for components, application shells, menus, and global ProcScript.
